title: Real estate and US reindustrialisation: Savills’ Ken Biberaj
author: Ken Biberaj, Executive Managing Director, Savills; Bryan Bille, Lead Policy and Geopolitical Analyst, Benchmark
text: Jun 23, 2026 | 10:00Real estate and US reindustrialisation: Interview with Savills’ Ken BiberajSavillsGiga US 2026Ken Biberaj, Executive Managing Director, Savills; Bryan Bille, Lead Policy and Geopolitical Analyst, BenchmarkUS reindustrialisation depends not just on policy, but on the availability of land, power and permitting. Bryan Bille speaks with Savills’ Ken Biberaj about the real estate constraints shaping critical minerals and manufacturing projects, and why industrial policy must connect federal ambition with local execution.00:00Jun 23, 2026US deep sea mining policy: Interview with The Metals Company’s Craig SheskyUS deep sea mining policy is the focus as Bryan Bille speaks with The Metals Company’s Craig Shesky about permitting, regulation and the legal framework for deep sea mining. The interview explores why policy clarity will be critical to commercial development.00:00Jun 17, 2026US energy storage policy and manufacturing: Interview with LG Energy Solution’s Bob LeeAs US energy storage demand accelerates, manufacturing flexibility is becoming a competitive advantage. In this interview, Iola Hughes speaks with LG Energy Solution’s Bob Lee about shifting capacity to LFP, serving utility-scale storage and the policy certainty needed to unlock further domestic investment.00:00Jun 16, 2026Key takeaways from Giga US 2026: Interview with Benchmark CEO Andrew MillerBenchmark CEO Andrew Miller discussed his key takeaways from the Giga US 2026 conference in Washington, DC.00:00Jun 15, 2026Advancing US critical minerals with software and autonomy: Interview with Mariana Minerals’ Turner CaldwellUS critical minerals, mining software and autonomy are the focus as Bryan Bille interviews Mariana Minerals CEO Turner Caldwell. The discussion covers copper, lithium, refining, project development and how software can improve efficiency, lower costs and strengthen domestic supply chains.00:00Jun 12, 2026 Investment Panel: Accelerating investment in critical mineral supply chains crucial for economic competitiveness and national security00:00Jun 12, 2026 Regional Focus Presentation: The growing role of Australian critical materials00:00Jun 12, 2026 Regional Focus Presentation: The growing role of Brazilian critical minerals in securing global supply00:00Jun 12, 2026Panel: Driving Demand: What’s Powering the Next Phase of the U.S. EV Market?This panel unpacks how policy, pricing pressures, and shifting consumer behaviour are shaping the next wave of EV adoption.
